title: Citrusy Gooey Croatian Fries Stir-fry
description: A sick-day inspired plant-based friendly dish featuring citrusy and gooey fries prepared with a unique stir-fry technique.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat (around 400°F/205°C).
In a mixing bowl, combine half of the olive oil with lemon juice, lime juice, minced garlic, red pepper flakes, and salt. Mix well.
Add sweet potato slices to the marinade mixture, ensuring they are evenly coated. Marinate for at least 30 minutes or up to an hour in the refrigerator for maximum flavor infusion.
Once ready to cook, place the marinated sweet potatoes on a grill pan lined with parchment paper and grilled on both sides until tender and crispy (approximately 15-20 minutes).
Meanwhile, mix remaining olive oil, lemon juice, lime juice, and a pinch of salt together in another bowl.
When fries are done, toss them into the marinade mixture for about one minute to create a gooey effect. Remove from pan and serve hot with your choice of plant-based sauce or dip.
